text: Our results are consistently presented as the mean ± standard deviation (SD). For all statistical analyses and data visualization, we leveraged GraphPad Prism software (version 9.5.0). When comparing two groups, we typically employed a standard t-test. For comparisons involving three or more groups, we turned to either one-way or two-way analysis of variance (ANOVA), always followed by Tukey’s multiple-comparison test. Crucially, each figure caption clearly indicated the exact number of experimental replicates and also provided a detailed account of the specific statistical methods employed for that dataset.
